description: Maps user-prompt keywords to framework scaffolds. AIWizard scans incoming prompts for these keywords (case-insensitive, word-boundary) and loads the matching scaffold.

audiokit.promptIntent: User wants to build a macOS audio/music/MIDI app using AudioKit. Use this scaffold as the synth foundation; extend with the user's specific request (sequencer, drum machine, FX rack, etc.).

web-components-3d.promptIntent: User wants a 3D web game or interactive 3D scene built on three.js (WebGL2). Compose from the web-components-3d Lego kit (core, controls, entities, systems, effects, ui) with a LOCAL relative importmap (no CDN), runs offline under file://. Use canonical specifiers: import * as THREE from 'three'; import {OrbitControls} from 'three/addons/controls/OrbitControls.js'.

_seedingPlan: This file starts with one entry (audiokit) as a proof of concept. Additional entries get added incrementally as scaffolds are built - see FRAMEWORK_REFERENCE_CATALOG.md for the full 160-entry roadmap. New framework PRs MUST add an entry here.
